zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Root於1667年4月13日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈普爾諾薩普頓時，他的父親Joseph Root27歲，母親Hannah Haynes30歲。他於1691年與Sarah Clark在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和7個女兒的父母。他去世於1758年1月19日在美國麻薩諸塞州哈普爾諾薩普頓享年90歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Root于1667年4月13日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈普爾諾薩普頓时，他的父亲Joseph Root27岁，母亲Hannah Haynes30岁。他于1691年与Sarah Clark在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和7个女儿的父母。他去世于1758年1月19日在美国马萨诸塞州哈普爾諾薩普頓享年90岁。

nameMeanings.name: Root
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: perhaps a nickname for a cheerful person, from an unrecorded Middle English rote (Old English rōt) ‘glad, cheerful’.

English: from Middle English rote, route, rotte ‘rote’ (of uncertain origin but apparently ultimately akin to Welsh crwth), perhaps used for a player of the medieval stringed instrument, a kind of harp or fiddle. Compare Rutter .
English: perhaps a habitational name from Wroot (Lincolnshire), from Old English wrōt ‘snout, spur of land’.

variants.name: Rooth
meanings: English: habitational name from Rowarth in New Mills (Derbyshire), from Old English rūh ‘rough’ + worth ‘enclosure’.

variants.name: Rutter
meanings: English: occupational name from Old French roteor, roteeur, routeeur ‘player on the rote’, a musical instrument, a kind of harp or fiddle. The regular modern development of the name would have been to Roter (rhyming with boater), and to Router or Rowter (rhyming with doubter). These variants survive in small numbers, but the principal modern form is Rutter, found in fairly large numbers across England, especially in the northeast and in the West Midlands. The shortened vowel in Rutter may have been influenced by rotte, rutte, Middle English variants of Old French rote. Compare Root 2.

English: nickname from Middle English roter, rotour ‘robber, plunderer’, also ‘scoundrel, lecher’, a borrowing of Old French rotier, Anglo-Norman French routier ‘soldier of fortune; robber, highwayman, ruffian’, though this is a less likely source of the modern surname.
Dutch: nickname from Middle Dutch rut(t)er ‘freebooter, footpad’, cognate with 2 above.

variants.name: Rutt
meanings: English: probably a variant of   Root  .
German (Rütt): from a short form of the personal name Rudolf .

variants.name: Roots
meanings: English (Kent): variant of Root , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Root was born on 13 April 1667, in Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, his father, Joseph Root, was 27 and his mother, Hannah Haynes, was 30. He married Sarah Clark in 1691, in Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 7 daughters. He died on 19 January 1758, in Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts, United States, at the age of 90.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Root est né le 13 avril 1667, à Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, Joseph Root, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Hannah Haynes, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Sarah Clark en 1691, à Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 7 filles. Il est décédé le 19 janvier 1758, à Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts, États-Unis, à l’âge de 90 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Root am 13. April 1667 in Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war sein Vater Joseph Root 27 und seine Mutter Hannah Haynes 30. Er hat 1691 in Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America Sarah Clark geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Er starb am 19. Januar 1758 im Alter von 90 Jahren in Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Root è nato il il 13 aprile 1667 nel Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, il suo padre, Joseph Root, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Hannah Haynes, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Sarah Clark nel 1691, nel Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 7 figlie. Morì il 19 gennaio 1758, nel Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 90 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Rootが1667年4月13日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーハンプシュアイアノーサンプトンで生まれた時，父Joseph Rootは27歳，母Hannah Haynesは30歳であった。1691年にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州でSarah Clarkと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼は1758年1月19日にアメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州ハンプシュアイアノーサンプトンで90歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Root(이)가 1667년 4월 13일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 함프실르 노르섬프턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Joseph Root(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Hannah Haynes(은)는 30세였다. 그는 1691년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주에서 Sarah Clark(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1758년 1월 19일 미국 매사추세츠 주 함프실르 노르섬프턴에서 90세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Root nasceu em 13 de abril de 1667, em Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, seu pai, Joseph Root, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Hannah Haynes, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Sarah Clark em 1691, em Conecticute, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 7 filhas. Ele faleceu em 19 de janeiro de 1758, em Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América, com 90 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Root родился 13 апреля 1667 г. в местности нортамптон, хампшир, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика, его отцу по имени Joseph Root было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Hannah Haynes, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Sarah Clark в 1691 г. в местности Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 7 дочерей. Он умер 19 января 1758 г. в местности нортамптон, хампшир, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 90 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Root nació el 13 de abril de 1667, en Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, su papá, Joseph Root, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Hannah Haynes, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Sarah Clark en 1691, en Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió el 19 de enero de 1758, en Northampton, Hampshire, Masachusets, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 90 años.
